_comment: GEA-08 (D445): the Chief of Staff morning brief — DATA-DECLARED priority rules for the read-only three-line panel at the top of the President's Desk (docs/design/genre-elite-p1-contracts.md GEA-08). Each rule: a stable id, a reader id resolved by src/109-chief-of-staff.js's CLOSED registry of pure property-path reads (the already-materialized per-turn values the desk tabs themselves render — the D443 §19 purity lesson: the brief NEVER calls a lazy-init tab wrapper), a threshold op (lt | gte), a deterministic severity for the ordering (desc, ties by id asc), a plain-text copy template ({value} substitution only — no HTML, no eval), the REAL desk tab id the line deep-links to, and a short label. The panel caps at config.maxLines (hard-capped 3 in code), writes NOTHING, computes NO new aggregates, and renders the honest allQuiet state when no rule fires. Thresholds are presentation-tuning values, not history claims. Validated by tools/validate-data-schemas.mjs (validateChiefOfStaff; the cos-badrule permanent fixture): closed shapes, known reader ids, ops, bounded rules, and tab ids live-derived from the src/30 shell registry.

config.allQuiet: All quiet this morning, Mr. President — no office demands your immediate attention.

rules.copy: The treasury is down to ${value} — revenue needs attention.
rules.label: The Treasury

rules.copy: Public morale stands at {value} of 100 — the home front is wavering.
rules.label: The War Effort

rules.copy: The mobilizable reserve is down to {value} thousand men.
rules.label: The War Effort

rules.copy: Foreign recognition pressure stands at {value} of 100.
rules.label: Diplomacy

rules.copy: Prices rose {value}% last quarter — inflation is eating the war chest.
rules.label: The Treasury

rules.copy: Railroad integrity is at {value} of 100 — the supply arteries are fraying.
rules.label: The War Effort
